items.title: What this desert city can teach the world about tackling heat deaths
items.dek: Maricopa County in Arizona has some of the hottest temperatures, but it has reduced the number of heat-related deaths.
items.body: Maricopa County in Arizona has some of the hottest temperatures, but it has reduced the number of heat-related deaths.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: How these twins' rare growth disorder could provide the key to preventing cancer
items.dek: Researchers have found that people with Laron syndrome have a lower incidence of cancer than the wider population.
items.body: Researchers have found that people with Laron syndrome have a lower incidence of cancer than the wider population.
